login.emailVerifiedBanner: Your email is confirmed. You can sign in below.

signup.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions.
signup.goToLogin: Already have an account? Log in

signup.errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
signup.errors.invalidRequest: Submitted data is invalid. Check all fields.

signup.checkEmailHint: Open the email and click the link to activate your account. After that you can log in.
verifyEmail.errorMissing: The activation link is missing. Use the link from your email.
verifyEmail.errorInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Register again or ask for a new email.
verifyEmail.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
dashboard.themeToggleAria: Switch between light and dark dashboard theme
dashboard.video.sectionLead: Choose which replica speaks and paste the script. Replica ID and script are required; everything else is optional and only included when you fill it in.
dashboard.video.transparentBackgroundHin: Outputs WebM with alpha; requires fast mode (enabled automatically when checked). Do not use with website background URL.
dashboard.video.errorUnknown: Request failed. Check that the API is running and CORS is configured.
dashboard.video.requestsLead: Everything you’ve started from this account shows up here, newest first.
dashboard.video.tableEmpty: No requests yet. Create one from Overview → Video request.
dashboard.video.tableLoadError: Could not load the request list.
dashboard.replicas.hint: For video requests on Overview, use a replica whose status is “completed”. Click an ID to copy it.
dashboard.replicas.empty: Tavus returned no replicas. Check another page, or verify TAVUS_API_KEY on the API server.
hero.lead: You publish an offer faster — before that, the buyer “reads” it and reacts.
hero.intro: AI turns your text, offers, and materials into polished videos — ready for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, or client chats. No film crew. One dashboard.
hero.headline: From a product photo to a short video that looks serious.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration: business owner at laptop with AI video and automation UI around the screen
prednosti.title: Why business owners use this
prednosti.lede: Every day is the same loop: a new offer, the same channels, little time. Reinova helps it look tidy, fast, and “like you made an effort” — without you standing behind the camera.
prednosti.c1p: No more “we’ll do it tomorrow”, no ten group messages to arrange a shoot. You set the tone once, then you just drop in what’s on sale and send it on.
prednosti.c2t: Looks premium, built for small business
prednosti.c2p: A short clip grabs attention better than a photo alone — the buyer hears price, deadline, location, and feels you’re serious, not “thrown together in a minute”.
prednosti.c3p: When it’s done, you have a link you can send on Viber, put on a story, or forward to a neighbour who passes it on. Clear, clean, no explaining “how to open the file”.
demo.title: What it looks like in practice
demo.prose: You keep doing what you already do every day — photograph stock and know what you want to say. We then tidy sound, picture, and story into one short clip that feels like a small ad, not a random story.
demo.imageAlt: Reinova: team with holographic video interface in a dark modern office
demo.s1t: a product or promo photo and short copy — what it is, at what price, until when.
demo.s2t: so every offer still sounds like you’re there, without re-recording every time.
demo.s3h: We add a face that speaks:
demo.s3t: so the message feels alive and human, not just captions over a picture.
demo.s4h: We stitch everything into one video:
demo.s4t: your backdrop, a clear message, clean sound — ready to share.
demo.s5t: send it to customers, post wherever you like, and on the page they can click right away if they want to order or ask.
demo.note: You shouldn’t need a separate “marketing team”. You know what you sell — Reinova just packages it in a format people actually watch to the end today.
dobijas.title: What you actually get
dobijas.lede: Simple things that work in everyday life — no video-editing school and no waiting for someone’s free slot.
dobijas.c1t: One clear screen to enter data
dobijas.c1p: Image + text. No complicated steps and no “what do I click now?”.
dobijas.c2t: A voice that sounds like your business
dobijas.c2p: We agree once how you speak, then you only change the offer — the tone stays yours.
dobijas.c3p: You know the video is being made, that it isn’t “stuck”, and you can plan the post.
dobijas.c4p: A link where they watch the video and can click contact or order right away — without sending huge files.
plan.title: How we start together
plan.lede: We don’t run a “six-month mega project”. We work in short loops until you feel this really saves you time and brings order to your posts.
plan.t1t: we see what you sell, how you post today, and what would help you most.
plan.t2t: we make a few real ads from your photos — so you see how it looks for you.
plan.t3t: we agree who sends material and how quickly you get a finished video.
plan.t4t: every new promo becomes “drop in and share” instead of panic around posting.
prvi.title: One step that makes everything after easier
prvi.prose: Once we align how you want to sound in ads, every next post is faster: only the offer changes, while the “feel” stays recognisable — as if you’re still in the shop talking to the customer live.
onama.title: About us
onama.p1: Reinova comes from the same place as your work: the rush of offers, group chats, and wanting it all to look tidy without night shifts on your shoulders.
onama.p2: We don’t sell “tech for tech’s sake”. We build a tool that walks with the owner who holds the till, stock, and people — and wants marketing as simple as a good morning coffee.
kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.p1: If you’d like to try with your photo and one offer —
kontakt.p3: . We’ll arrange a chat, show an example, and see if this really shortens the path to the customer for you.
